mxbai activated and direct active-vector rerun measured memory pairs A/B. Pair A top-5 Jaccard = 25%; Pair B top-5 Jaccard = 0%; both are below the 60% threshold, so the scenario cannot reach PASS even before counting CocoIndex pairs.

nomic-embed-text-v1.5 was reactivated after corpus hygiene. The compound auto-migration/cascade/warmup-failure CocoIndex query returned factory/cascade mirror paths in the top results, but not enough of the required constituent set. Counting mirrored factory results as the cascade constituent, top-3 had 1/4 constituents and top-5 had 1/4; context-server.ts, the llama-cpp provider implementation, and the 017 default-flip implementation summary were absent from the returned set. Required >=2/4 in top-3 and >=3/4 in top-5 was not met.

nomic-embed-text-v1.5 was reactivated after pruning orphaned memory_index rows and replacing runtime sampling with deterministic 409-fixture.json. The repaired fixture improved the Nomic score from the stale-fixture 5/10 top-3 result to 6/10 top-3, but the closure threshold remains 8/10. Passing samples were ids 4460 rank 1, 7007 rank 1, 7636 rank 2, 7183 rank 1, 12897 rank 1, and 13352 rank 1. Failing samples were ids 7479, 8048, 7639, and 13310 absent from top-3. This keeps cat-24/409 open and points to reranking or trigger-lane weighting rather than another pure dense swap.
